enriched_points.expanded_content: Traditional lubricants, such as mineral oils and synthetic fluids, reduce friction and wear in mechanical systems, but may not provide optimal energy efficiency in advanced applications.
MXenes exhibit unique layered structures and surface properties, enhancing lubrication performance by significantly reducing friction and wear in various tribological applications.
These coatings, often made from polymers or advanced materials, offer long-lasting protection against wear, improving energy efficiency by minimizing friction in mechanical systems.
